subject: Sports
title: The Spurs: Quiet Greatness
description: One-minute skill: The Spurs: Quiet Greatness.

hook.text: No drama, no headlines, no flash. Just five championships in 16 years from a small-market team.

buildup.text: Coach Gregg Popovich and Tim Duncan built the San Antonio Spurs into a model of consistency.

discovery.text: Duncan, Tony Parker, and Manu Ginobili formed a 'Big Three' from three different countries.

twist.text: The Spurs' 2014 Finals performance—dismantling the Heat with beautiful passing—is called the best ever.

climax.text: In an era of superteams and superstars, the Spurs won by playing together better than anyone else.

punchline.text: Five rings without ever making a headline. The anti-dynasty dynasty.

quiz.question: How many championships did the Spurs win with Duncan, Parker, and Ginobili?
